top_signals.title: Latvia sends mobile intercept units to Russian border in wake of drone incursions
top_signals.summary: “The force teams we plan to deploy to the border in the coming days will be equipped with local interceptor drones,” a Latvian military official said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Salesforce beats on earnings and revenue but full-year guidance comes in light
top_signals.summary: Salesforce has been hammered by investors on concern that artificial intelligence models and services will disrupt some traditional software products.

top_signals.title: Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund reappointed
top_signals.summary: Nigel Topping, Tania Songini and Marianne Økland have been reappointed as Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund (NWF).

top_signals.title: Can you enforce strong Active Directory password rules without frustrating users?
top_signals.summary: Strong Active Directory passwords don't have to come at the expense of usability. Specops Software explains how passphrases, breached password protection, and self-service resets can improve security without frustrating users. [...]

top_signals.title: Snowflake soars 30% on earnings beat and plan to spend $6 billion on Amazon cloud
top_signals.summary: Snowflake is going deeper with Amazon's Web Services, and plans to use its Arm-based Graviton chips.

top_signals.title: Weathernews Launches SeaNavigator Mobile
top_signals.summary: Weathernews Inc. has launched SeaNavigator Mobile, a dedicated mobile application for iOS and Android designed to transform how shore-based operations teams monitor vessels, manage communications and confirm voyage plans.SeaNavigator Mobile…

top_signals.title: BOLL FILTER CORPORATION appoints Goltens as authorized filtration solution distributor
top_signals.summary: Goltens Worldwide's US stations in Florida and Texas have been officially appointed as an authorized distributors for BOLL FILTER CORPORATION, a globally recognized leader in advanced industrial filtration solutions technology.With an operational footprint in Houston and Miami…

top_signals.title: KnowledgeDeliver flaw exploited as a zero-day to install web shells
top_signals.summary: Hackers exploited a critical zero-day vulnerability in a server running the KnowledgeDeliver learning management system (LMS) to deploy the Godzilla web shell. [...]
